description: The core deliverable is missing: add `tokio::sync::Mutex as AsyncMutex` to imports, implement `git_workspace_lock() -> &'static Mutex<HashMap<PathBuf, Arc<AsyncMutex<()>>>>` and `workspace_mutex(workspace: &PathBuf) -> Arc<AsyncMutex<()>>` helpers, and call `workspace_mutex(workspace).lock().await` at the top of both `run_git_phase_commit` and `run_git_merge_to_main_inner` (or `execute_phase_commit_task`) so concurrent tasks on the same workspace queue behind the lock while tasks on different workspaces remain unaffected.
title: Implement per-workspace async mutex to serialize git index operations
